text:
Revenue for Nestlé (NESN.SW)
Revenue in 2024: £74.08 Billion
According to Nestlé's latest financial reports the company's current revenue (TTM ) is £74.08 Billion. In 2024 the company made a revenue of £74.08 Billion a decrease over the revenue in the year 2023 that were of £81.00 Billion. The revenue is the total amount of income that a company generates by the sale of goods or services. Unlike with the earnings no expenses are subtracted.
